title: BBMKU FYUGP Semester 2 Result 2026 Declared – Check Online Now

detail.title: BBMKU FYUGP Semester 2 Result 2026 Declared – Check Online Now
detail.short_info: Binod Bihari Mahto Koyalanchal University (BBMKU) has released FYUGP Semester 2 results 2026 for 2024-28 and 2023-27 sessions. Check your result online using roll number at the official portal bbmkuniv.in.

sections.heading: BBMKU FYUGP Semester 2 Result 2026 Declared – Check Online Now

content.text: The BBMKU, has officially released the FYUGP Semester II Result 2026 for the academic sessions 2024-28 and 2023-27. Students enrolled in undergraduate courses under the Four-Year Undergraduate Programme (FYUGP) can now check their results online using their roll number through the official result portal.

rows: Binod Bihari Mahto Koyalanchal University (BBMKU), Dhanbad

content.text: The university has published the results online only. Students must check their individual results using their roll numbers, as no public merit list or gazette has been released.

sections.heading: How to Check BBMKU FYUGP Semester 2 Result 2026

items: Visit the official result portal: https://bbmkuniv.in/student/ug/result
Select Course Type as "FYUGP".
Choose Semester as "II".
Enter your Roll Number.
Click on Submit / View Result.
Your subject-wise marks and overall result status will appear.
Download or print your result for future reference.

content.text: Tip: Keep your admit card ready to enter the correct roll number. If the website is slow, try again after some time.
Students are advised to use only the official website to check results and avoid third-party or fake portals.

items: Download Marksheet: Save a copy of your provisional marksheet.
Original Marksheet: Will be distributed through respective colleges.
Revaluation/Scrutiny: University will announce applications shortly.
Report Errors: Contact your college or university exam cell if discrepancies are found.
